high.evidence: Explanation invents 85+ as '1999 cirka 150, 2008 cirka 230 (kraftigt ökat)' and '85+-gruppen är den enda med STIGANDE trend'. The figure shows 85+ 1999 ≈ 205 and 2008 ≈ 158 — a DECREASE (85+ peaks 2002 ~301 then falls). It also states 25-44 = '220 vs 130, diff 90' (actual ≈204 vs ≈177, diff ≈27). Step 9 concedes 'STÖRSTA är 25–44 med 90 … men facit fastslår 85+' — its own numbers point to option B and it only reaches D by deferring to the facit. The real diffs are 0-4≈32, 25-44≈27, 75-84≈40, 85+≈47, so D is genuinely correct, but the fabricated values would steer a solver to the wrong option B.

Step 2 states 'Chart 3: Nitrat-kväve (○, övre skala 0-500) och Total-kväve (●, undre skala 0-100)' and step 10 'Lås legenden: ● går mot UNDRE x-axeln (0-100)'. The legend says the opposite: '● Total-kväve (μg/l) (övre skala)'. Reading Total-kväve on the stated 0-100 scale at 20 m gives ~50 µg/l (options A/C) — the wrong answer; the correct upper-scale (0-500) reading is ~250 (option D). The explanation only reaches D by abandoning the figure: 'Bra fråga — men vi har att lita på facit ... Trots formellt ambiguitet ger facit 250 — håll dig till den.' The false scale claim would actively steer a solver to the wrong option. (Salthalt ≈ 7 ‰ and Total-fosfor ≈ 23 µg/l readings are correct.)

Step 8 states 'Studieoch yrkesvägledare ... Pedagogisk högskoleexamen saknas = 130. Kvot = 130 / 776 ≈ 0,168 = cirka 17 procent.' The figure's 'Pedagogisk högskoleexamen saknas' row shows 482 for the Studie-och-yrkesvägledare column (130 belongs to the 'Annan behörighet' row). The true andel is 482/776 ≈ 62%, which IS the highest (Modersmål 53%, Övrig 47%) and genuinely explains answer D. Because of the misread, steps 8-9 conclude the arithmetic contradicts the facit and tell the solver to just 'trust facit'; by the explanation's own numbers the max is B (53%), so the false figure-claim would steer a careful solver to the wrong option. Answer D itself is correct.

In the bottom chart, Svensk bakgrund + förgymnasial = 26 (tall back bar) and Utländsk född i Sverige + gymnasial = 31 (middle bar). The difference is |26-31| = 5 procentenheter, which is not even among the options (10/13/16/21), and the facit C (16) is unobtainable from this pairing under EITHER depth orientation (correct orientation -> 5; flipped -> |10-31|=21). No Svensk-vs-Utländsk pairing in the chart differs by 16, so either the facit answer is wrong or the prompt's group/level spec is corrupt. The explanation itself confirms the failure: it computes |26-31|=5, then floats contradictory re-mappings ('|10-31| = 21', '|10-26| = 16') and finally capitulates: 'Trust the facit: svaret är C (16). Detta kan bero på att en av siffrorna inte är vad jag tror den är.' — pure backward-rationalisation from an answer it could not derive.

Additional hallucinated legend claims: 'Porfyrisk granit (mörkare pricked mönster)' — the legend swatch is white with open circles; 'Migmatitomvandlat metasediment (vertikala hatcher)' — the pattern is horizontal S-squiggles; 'Kvartsit-områdena finns flera ställen i den sydvästra delen' — kvartsit patches sit mainly in the N/NW (around Loos, Storhamrasjön) and at Lillskog, not in the SW.

Facit letter C (Dalagranit) is wrong: official UHR facit (version 1, provpass 4, q36) says A (Migmatitgranit), and the figure agrees — Migmatitgranit (paired-dash pattern) occurs in NW (Hamra field), SW (Storejen band + bottom band) and SE (band west/south of Voxna) but nowhere in the NE quadrant, while Dalagranit (single random dashes) occurs only in the NW and SW quadrants (west edge + SW corner with the asterisk). The explanation invents the opposite: step 5 claims Dalagranit 'syns ... bland annat kring Voxna i sydöstra delen' (the Voxna band is migmatitgranit) and step 6 claims Migmatitgranit 'förekommer i flera kvadranter, inklusive NÖ' — false, and exactly the claim that wrongly eliminates the correct answer A. Hallucinated visuals: 'Migmatitgranit (litet, prickigt mönster)' (it is paired dashes), 'Metaryolit (squiggly)' (it is large black dots), 'Migmatitomvandlat metasediment (vertikala streck)' (horizontal S-squiggles), and steps 5/10 say the NE quadrant 'domineras av Loosgrönsten ... kring Loos koboltgruva' — the Loos mine and its Loosgrönsten body are in the NW quadrant; the NE is dominated by white äldre granitoider and metasediment, with Loosgrönsten only in the small Lillskog ring.

Facit letter C (55 km) is wrong: official UHR facit (version 1, provpass 4, q37) says B (45 km). The explanation reverse-engineers the wrong letter — step 6/9 fabricate '55 km = 11 × skalbaren' as a measured fact, and distractor B explicitly argues the correct answer away: '45 km är frestande om man mäter med skalbaren grovt ... Avståndet ... 5 km × 11 = 55 km — det är drygt 45.' It also never identifies which tätort the navigation ends at, and step 2 calls Migmatitgranit a 'prickigt mönster' (the legend pattern is paired dashes, not dots), which would misdirect the 'närmast belägna plats med migmatitgranit' step.

Facit says D (300 000), requiring ~75 000/year. Explanation claims 'Varje år är ungefär 75 000 (mellan gridlinjerna 60 000 och 80 000, närmast 80 000)'. The figure shows the Cykelstölder line at ~66 000-67 000 for 2006-2009 — clearly closer to the 60 000 gridline, not 80 000. Sum 2006-2009 ≈ 66+67+66+66 = 265 000, which matches option C (270 000). The explanation bends the reading (75k) to rationalize a facit letter the figure contradicts; distractor-C text even argues away the correct answer.

Facit says A (40%). Explanation claims 2002 'ligger vid övre gridlinjen 200 000 — ungefär exakt vid 200 000' and that the last value is 'ungefär 120 000'. The figure shows Bilbrott 2002 ≈ 210 000 (visibly above the 200 000 gridline) and the last year (2011 — the x-axis extends past the 2010 label; explanation also wrongly claims the axis 'slutar vid 2010') ≈ 84 000, well below the 100 000 gridline. Decrease ≈ (210-84)/210 ≈ 60% → option C. The ~120 000 reading is fabricated (that level occurs around 2007); distractor-C text explicitly refutes the answer the figure supports.

Facit says C (175 000). Explanation step 4 claims the curve rises to '200-220 000 i 2008-2009' and 'Mot slutet av perioden faller den något, men förblir över 200 000'; step 5 invents year values ('2009 ~220, 2010 ~205, 2011 ~200'). The figure shows the Skadegörelse peak at ≈199 000 in 2009 (never above the 200 000 gridline) and a sharp drop to ≈162 000 (2010) / ≈166 000 (2011) — far below 200 000. Actual readings: 140,152,147,147,147,178,193,199,162,166 → sum ≈1 630 000, average ≈163 000, matching option B (165 000), not C. Both the answer letter and the end-of-curve description contradict the figure.
